meaning: On Screen Display,用于显示器与用户交互的重要窗口
examples: OSD as a standard (see sidebar) can be built in a number of ways.
Each object in an OSD is represented by a 64-bit identifier in a flat namespace.
We would no longer have TechCrunch stories criticizing OSD for another record quarterly loss and 22 money-losing quarters in a row.
The PB278Q also comes with 100% sRGB color space compatibility and provides users the option of selecting their preferred settings via an OSD.
